hidReceive.comment: Initiating command ID with top bit set (0x80xx)

commands.name: Get Firmware Version
commands.payloadDescription: No Command Payload is required; send an empty payload to read the keyboard and Bluetooth firmware versions.
commands.ackDescription: The acknowledgement returns a status code plus the keyboard and BT firmware Major, Minor, and Build version fields.

commands.name: Set Profile
commands.payloadDescription: The Command Payload selects the active profile; 0x00 means None and 0x01-0x04 select Profile 1-4.
commands.ackDescription: The acknowledgement returns only a status code indicating whether the profile switch succeeded.

commands.name: Get Profile State
commands.payloadDescription: No Command Payload is required; send an empty payload to read the currently active profile.
commands.ackDescription: The acknowledgement returns a status code and the current profile state.

commands.name: Set Key Mapping
commands.payloadDescription: The Command Payload specifies the layer, row, column, modifier, and key code used to program a single key mapping.
commands.ackDescription: The acknowledgement returns only a status code indicating whether the key mapping was written successfully.

commands.name: Get Key Mapping
commands.payloadDescription: The Command Payload specifies the layer, row, and column of the key mapping to read.
commands.ackDescription: The acknowledgement returns a status code plus the requested layer, row, column, modifier, and key code.

commands.name: Get All Key Mapping
commands.payloadDescription: No Command Payload is required; send an empty payload to read all key mappings sequentially.
commands.ackDescription: The acknowledgement uses the status code to report success, sending, or failure, and returns each mapping with layer, row, column, modifier, and key code fields.

commands.name: Set Lighting Effect
commands.payloadDescription: The Command Payload selects the lighting effect to apply, such as Static, Disco, Wave, Prism, or Rainfall.
commands.ackDescription: The acknowledgement returns only a status code indicating whether the lighting effect was set successfully.

commands.name: Get Lighting Effect
commands.payloadDescription: No Command Payload is required; send an empty payload to read the current lighting effect.
commands.ackDescription: The acknowledgement returns a status code and the currently selected lighting effect.

commands.name: Set Lighting Color
commands.payloadDescription: The Command Payload provides the primary and secondary ARGB color values used to configure lighting colors.
commands.ackDescription: The acknowledgement returns only a status code indicating whether the lighting color was set successfully.

commands.name: Get Lighting Color
commands.payloadDescription: No Command Payload is required; send an empty payload to read the current primary and secondary lighting colors.
commands.ackDescription: The acknowledgement returns a status code plus the primary and secondary ARGB color values.

commands.name: Get Knob State
commands.payloadDescription: No Command Payload is required; send an empty payload to read the current knob function state.
commands.ackDescription: The acknowledgement returns a status code and the knob mode, such as Volume, Effect, Light Color, or Multimedia.

commands.name: Set Button Lock
commands.payloadDescription: The Command Payload selects the button lock state; 0x00 locks and 0x01 unlocks.
commands.ackDescription: The acknowledgement returns only a status code indicating whether the button lock state was set successfully.

commands.name: Get Button Lock State
commands.payloadDescription: No Command Payload is required; send an empty payload to read the button lock state.
commands.ackDescription: The acknowledgement returns a status code and the current locked or unlocked state.

commands.name: Set Rapid Trigger Value
commands.payloadDescription: The Command Payload sets the Rapid Trigger press and release thresholds using separate high and low bytes.
commands.ackDescription: The acknowledgement returns only a status code indicating whether the Rapid Trigger thresholds were set successfully.

commands.name: Get Rapid Trigger Value
commands.payloadDescription: No Command Payload is required; send an empty payload to read the Rapid Trigger press and release thresholds.
commands.ackDescription: The acknowledgement returns a status code plus the high and low bytes for the Rapid Trigger press and release thresholds.

commands.name: Set Tachyon mode
commands.payloadDescription: The Command Payload selects the Tachyon mode state; 0x00 disables it and 0x01 enables it.
commands.ackDescription: The acknowledgement returns only a status code indicating whether Tachyon mode was set successfully.

commands.name: Get Tachyon mode
commands.payloadDescription: No Command Payload is required; send an empty payload to read the Tachyon mode state.
commands.ackDescription: The acknowledgement returns a status code and the current Tachyon mode on/off state.

commands.name: SOCD Binding
commands.payloadDescription: The Command Payload defines the SOCD primary key, secondary key, priority strategy, and Alt pressed behavior.
commands.ackDescription: The acknowledgement returns only a status code indicating whether the SOCD binding was set successfully.

commands.name: Get SOCD Binding
commands.payloadDescription: No Command Payload is required; send an empty payload to read SOCD bindings sequentially.
commands.ackDescription: The acknowledgement uses the status code to report success, sending, or failure, and returns each SOCD binding with index, primary/secondary key locations, priority strategy, and Alt behavior.

commands.name: Set Multi Point Trigger Binding
commands.payloadDescription: The Command Payload specifies the target key location, up to four bound key codes, and the multi-point trigger press and release thresholds.
commands.ackDescription: The acknowledgement returns only a status code indicating whether the Multi Point Trigger binding was set successfully.

commands.name: Get Multi Point Trigger Binding
commands.payloadDescription: No Command Payload is required; send an empty payload to read Multi Point Trigger bindings sequentially.
commands.ackDescription: The acknowledgement uses the status code to report success, sending, or failure, and returns each binding with index, key location, key codes, and trigger thresholds.

commands.name: Set Toggle Key
commands.payloadDescription: The Command Payload specifies the layer, row, column, and key code used to configure a Toggle Key.
commands.ackDescription: The acknowledgement returns only a status code indicating whether the Toggle Key was set successfully.

commands.name: Get Toggle Key
commands.payloadDescription: No Command Payload is required; send an empty payload to read Toggle Key settings sequentially.
commands.ackDescription: The acknowledgement uses the status code to report success, sending, or failure, and returns each Toggle Key with index, location, and key code.

commands.name: Set Mod Tap Binding
commands.payloadDescription: The Command Payload specifies the key location, hold key code, and click key code used to configure a Mod Tap binding.
commands.ackDescription: The acknowledgement returns only a status code indicating whether the Mod Tap binding was set successfully.

commands.name: Get Mod Tap Binding
commands.payloadDescription: No Command Payload is required; send an empty payload to read Mod Tap bindings sequentially.
commands.ackDescription: The acknowledgement uses the status code to report success, sending, or failure, and returns each Mod Tap binding with index, location, hold key code, and click key code.

commands.name: Set Rappy Snappy
commands.payloadDescription: The Command Payload specifies the primary and secondary key locations used to configure Rappy Snappy.
commands.ackDescription: The acknowledgement returns only a status code indicating whether Rappy Snappy was set successfully.

commands.name: Get Rappy Snappy
commands.payloadDescription: No Command Payload is required; send an empty payload to read Rappy Snappy bindings sequentially.
commands.ackDescription: The acknowledgement uses the status code to report success, sending, or failure, and returns each primary and secondary key location pair.

commands.name: Set Factory Reset
commands.payloadDescription: No Command Payload is required; send an empty payload to execute a factory reset.
commands.ackDescription: The acknowledgement returns a status code indicating whether the factory reset succeeded; this command documents 0x01 as the success code.

commands.name: Get Dongle Firmware Version
commands.payloadDescription: No Command Payload is required; send an empty payload to read the dongle firmware version.
commands.ackDescription: The acknowledgement returns a status code plus the dongle firmware Major, Minor, and Build version fields.

commands.name: Get Layer Count
commands.payloadDescription: No Command Payload is required; send an empty payload to read the number of supported layers.
commands.ackDescription: The acknowledgement returns a status code and the layer count.

commands.name: Keymap Reset
commands.payloadDescription: No Command Payload is required; send an empty payload to reset the keymap settings.
commands.ackDescription: The acknowledgement returns only a status code indicating whether the keymap reset succeeded.

commands.name: Set Lighting Value
commands.payloadDescription: The Command Payload uses the type field to select Bright, Effect, Speed, or Color, followed by the value fields required by that type.
commands.ackDescription: The acknowledgement returns only a status code indicating whether the lighting value was set successfully.

payload.comment:
Bright : 0x00~0x64

Effect :
0x00 : 0ff
0x01 : Static
0x02 : Wave_Rainbow_Left
0x03 : Wave_Rainbow_Right
0x04 : Wave_Sunset_Left
0x05 : Wave_Sunset_Right
0x06 : Wave_Aurora_Left
0x07 : Wave_Aurora_Right
0x08 : Wave_Electro_Left
0x09 : Wave_Electro_Right
0x0a : Wave_Lemon_Left
0x0b : Wave_Lemon_Right
0x0c : Cycle_Rainbow
0x0d : Cycle_Sunset
0x0e : Cycle_Aurora
0x0f : Cycle_Electro
0x10 : Cycle_Lemon
0x11 : Rain Drop(Solid)
0x12 : Rain Drop(Random)
0x13 : Breathing(Solid)
0x14 : Breathing(Random)

Speed : 0x00~0x64

Color: 0x00~0Xff (Color R)

commands.name: Get Lighting Value
commands.payloadDescription: The Command Payload selects which lighting value to read, such as Bright, Effect, Speed, or Color.
commands.ackDescription: The acknowledgement returns a status code and the requested lighting value; color queries return RGB values.

ack.comment:
Bright : 0x00~0x64

Effect :
0x00 : 0ff
0x01 : Static
0x02 : Wave_Rainbow_Left
0x03 : Wave_Rainbow_Right
0x04 : Wave_Sunset_Left
0x05 : Wave_Sunset_Right
0x06 : Wave_Aurora_Left
0x07 : Wave_Aurora_Right
0x08 : Wave_Electro_Left
0x09 : Wave_Electro_Right
0x0a : Wave_Lemon_Left
0x0b : Wave_Lemon_Right
0x0c : Cycle_Rainbow
0x0d : Cycle_Sunset
0x0e : Cycle_Aurora
0x0f : Cycle_Electro
0x10 : Cycle_Lemon
0x11 : Rain Drop(Solid)
0x12 : Rain Drop(Random)
0x13 : Breathing(Solid)
0x14 : Breathing(Random)

Speed : 0x00~0x64

Color: 0x00~0Xff (Color R)

commands.name: Save Lighting
commands.payloadDescription: No Command Payload is required; send an empty payload to save the current lighting settings.
commands.ackDescription: The acknowledgement returns only a status code indicating whether the lighting settings were saved successfully.

commands.name: Get Macro Count
commands.payloadDescription: No Command Payload is required; send an empty payload to read the current macro count.
commands.ackDescription: The acknowledgement returns a status code and the number of macros.

commands.name: Get Macro Buffer Size
commands.payloadDescription: No Command Payload is required; send an empty payload to read the macro buffer capacity.
commands.ackDescription: The acknowledgement returns a status code and the macro buffer size as a big-endian Uint16 value.

commands.name: Set Macro Buffer
commands.payloadDescription: The Command Payload specifies the macro buffer offset, write size, and macro data used for chunked macro writes.
commands.ackDescription: The acknowledgement returns only a status code indicating whether the macro buffer write succeeded.

commands.name: Get Macro Buffer
commands.payloadDescription: The Command Payload specifies the macro buffer offset and size to read.
commands.ackDescription: The acknowledgement returns a status code, the actual offset, the data size, and the macro data.

commands.name: Set NKRO State
commands.payloadDescription: The Command Payload selects the NKRO state; 0 means 6KRO and 1 enables NKRO.
commands.ackDescription: The acknowledgement returns only a status code indicating whether the NKRO state was set successfully.

commands.name: Get NKRO State
commands.payloadDescription: No Command Payload is required; send an empty payload to read the NKRO state.
commands.ackDescription: The acknowledgement returns a status code and the NKRO enabled state.

commands.name: Set Lock LED Color
commands.payloadDescription: The Command Payload specifies the lock LED type and color ID used to set the Caps, Fn, Win, Num, or Scroll indicator color.
commands.ackDescription: The acknowledgement returns only a status code indicating whether the lock LED color was set successfully.

commands.name: Get Lock LED Color
commands.payloadDescription: No Command Payload is required; send an empty payload to read all lock LED colors.
commands.ackDescription: The acknowledgement returns a status code plus the color IDs for Caps, Fn, Win, Num, and Scroll.

ack.comment: Color IDs for Caps, Fn, Win, Num, Scroll

commands.name: Set Sleep Enable
commands.payloadDescription: The Command Payload selects whether sleep mode is enabled; 0 disables it and 1 enables it.
commands.ackDescription: The acknowledgement returns only a status code indicating whether the sleep setting was applied successfully.

commands.name: Get Sleep Enable
commands.payloadDescription: No Command Payload is required; send an empty payload to read whether sleep mode is enabled.
commands.ackDescription: The acknowledgement returns a status code and the sleep enabled state.

commands.name: Set Dimming Time
commands.payloadDescription: The Command Payload specifies the dimming timeout in minutes, with the low byte sent first.
commands.ackDescription: The acknowledgement returns only a status code indicating whether the dimming time was set successfully.

commands.name: Get Dimming Time
commands.payloadDescription: No Command Payload is required; send an empty payload to read the dimming timeout.
commands.ackDescription: The acknowledgement returns a status code and the dimming time in minutes, with the low byte first.

commands.name: Set Turn Off Time
commands.payloadDescription: The Command Payload specifies the turn-off timeout in minutes, with the low byte sent first.
commands.ackDescription: The acknowledgement returns only a status code indicating whether the turn-off time was set successfully.

commands.name: Get Turn Off Time
commands.payloadDescription: No Command Payload is required; send an empty payload to read the turn-off timeout.
commands.ackDescription: The acknowledgement returns a status code and the turn-off time in minutes, with the low byte first.

commands.name: Set Wired Scan Rate
commands.payloadDescription: The Command Payload specifies the wired scan rate index.
commands.ackDescription: The acknowledgement returns only a status code indicating whether the wired scan rate was set successfully.

commands.name: Get Wired Scan Rate
commands.payloadDescription: No Command Payload is required; send an empty payload to read the wired scan rate index.
commands.ackDescription: The acknowledgement returns a status code and the wired scan rate index.

commands.name: Set Wired Polling Rate
commands.payloadDescription: The Command Payload specifies the wired polling rate index.
commands.ackDescription: The acknowledgement returns only a status code indicating whether the wired polling rate was set successfully.

commands.name: Get Wired Polling Rate
commands.payloadDescription: No Command Payload is required; send an empty payload to read the wired polling rate index.
commands.ackDescription: The acknowledgement returns a status code and the wired polling rate index.

commands.name: Set 2.4G Scan Rate
commands.payloadDescription: The Command Payload specifies the 2.4G scan rate index.
commands.ackDescription: The acknowledgement returns only a status code indicating whether the 2.4G scan rate was set successfully.

commands.name: Get 2.4G Scan Rate
commands.payloadDescription: No Command Payload is required; send an empty payload to read the 2.4G scan rate index.
commands.ackDescription: The acknowledgement returns a status code and the 2.4G scan rate index.

commands.name: Set 2.4G Polling Rate
commands.payloadDescription: The Command Payload specifies the 2.4G polling rate index.
commands.ackDescription: The acknowledgement returns only a status code indicating whether the 2.4G polling rate was set successfully.

commands.name: Get 2.4G Polling Rate
commands.payloadDescription: No Command Payload is required; send an empty payload to read the 2.4G polling rate index.
commands.ackDescription: The acknowledgement returns a status code and the 2.4G polling rate index.

commands.name: Set Trigger Layer Lighting
commands.payloadDescription: The Command Payload uses the type field to select Trigger Layer Lighting Bright, Effect, Speed, Color, or Width, followed by the corresponding value fields.
commands.ackDescription: The acknowledgement returns only a status code indicating whether Trigger Layer Lighting was set successfully.

payload.comment:
Bright : 0x00~0x64

Effect :
0x00 : 0ff
0x01 : Ripple(Solid)
0x02 : Ripple(Random)
0x03 : Reactive(Solid)
0x04 : Reactive(Random)

Speed : 0x00~0x64

Color: 0x00~0Xff (Color R)

Width:
0x00 : 2 key (Slim)
0x01 : 3 key (Normal)
0x02 : 4 key (Thick)

commands.name: Get Trigger Layer Lighting
commands.payloadDescription: The Command Payload selects which Trigger Layer Lighting value to read, such as Bright, Effect, Speed, Color, or Width.
commands.ackDescription: The acknowledgement returns a status code and the requested Trigger Layer Lighting value.

ack.comment:
Bright : 0x00~0x64

Effect :
0x00 : 0ff
0x01 : Ripple(Solid)
0x02 : Ripple(Random)
0x03 : Reactive(Solid)
0x04 : Reactive(Random)

Speed : 0x00~0x64

Color: 0x00~0Xff (Color R)

Width:
0x00 : 2 key (Slim)
0x01 : 3 key (Normal)
0x02 : 4 key (Thick)

commands.name: Set Actuation State
commands.payloadDescription: The Command Payload selects the Actuation feature state; 0x00 disables it and 0x01 enables it.
commands.ackDescription: The acknowledgement returns only a status code indicating whether the Actuation state was set successfully.

commands.name: Get Actuation State
commands.payloadDescription: No Command Payload is required; send an empty payload to read the Actuation feature state.
commands.ackDescription: The acknowledgement returns a status code and the Actuation on/off state.

commands.name: Set Actuation Value
commands.payloadDescription: The Command Payload specifies the row, column, and actuation distance used to configure a single key actuation point.
commands.ackDescription: The acknowledgement returns only a status code indicating whether the single-key Actuation Value was set successfully.

commands.name: Get Actuation Value
commands.payloadDescription: The Command Payload specifies the row and column of the key whose Actuation Value should be read.
commands.ackDescription: The acknowledgement returns a status code, the key location, and the Actuation Value.

commands.name: Set All Actuation
commands.payloadDescription: The Command Payload specifies the shared Actuation Value used to set the actuation point for all keys at once.
commands.ackDescription: The acknowledgement returns only a status code indicating whether the all-key actuation setting was applied successfully.

commands.name: Get All Actuation
commands.payloadDescription: No Command Payload is required; send an empty payload to read all key Actuation Values sequentially.
commands.ackDescription: The acknowledgement uses the status code to report success, sending, or failure, and returns each row, column, and Actuation Value.

commands.name: Save Actuation Settings
commands.payloadDescription: No Command Payload is required; send an empty payload to save Actuation settings.
commands.ackDescription: The acknowledgement returns only a status code indicating whether the Actuation settings were saved successfully.

commands.name: Set Visual Feedback State
commands.payloadDescription: The Command Payload selects the Visual Feedback feature state; 0x00 disables it and 0x01 enables it.
commands.ackDescription: The acknowledgement returns only a status code indicating whether the Visual Feedback state was set successfully.

commands.name: Get Visual Feedback State
commands.payloadDescription: No Command Payload is required; send an empty payload to read the Visual Feedback feature state.
commands.ackDescription: The acknowledgement returns a status code and the Visual Feedback on/off state.

commands.name: Set Rapid Trigger State
commands.payloadDescription: The Command Payload selects the Rapid Trigger mode: off, press-only, or press-and-release.
commands.ackDescription: The acknowledgement returns only a status code indicating whether the Rapid Trigger state was set successfully.

commands.name: Get Rapid Trigger State
commands.payloadDescription: No Command Payload is required; send an empty payload to read the Rapid Trigger feature state.
commands.ackDescription: The acknowledgement returns a status code and the current Rapid Trigger mode.

commands.name: Set Rapid Trigger Press Value ref 0x0108
commands.payloadDescription: The Command Payload specifies the row, column, and Rapid Trigger Press Value used to set a single-key press threshold.
commands.ackDescription: The acknowledgement returns only a status code indicating whether the Rapid Trigger Press Value was set successfully.

commands.name: Get Rapid Trigger Press Value ref 0x0108
commands.payloadDescription: The Command Payload specifies the row and column of the key whose Rapid Trigger Press Value should be read.
commands.ackDescription: The acknowledgement returns a status code, the key location, and the Rapid Trigger Press Value.

commands.name: Set Rapid Trigger Release Value ref 0x0108
commands.payloadDescription: The Command Payload specifies the row, column, and Rapid Trigger Release Value used to set a single-key release threshold.
commands.ackDescription: The acknowledgement returns only a status code indicating whether the Rapid Trigger Release Value was set successfully.

commands.name: Get Rapid Trigger Release Value ref 0x0108
commands.payloadDescription: The Command Payload specifies the row and column of the key whose Rapid Trigger Release Value should be read.
commands.ackDescription: The acknowledgement returns a status code, the key location, and the Rapid Trigger Release Value.

commands.name: Get All Rapid Trigger Release Value
commands.payloadDescription: No Command Payload is required; send an empty payload to read all Rapid Trigger press and release values sequentially.
commands.ackDescription: The acknowledgement uses the status code to report success, sending, or failure, and returns each row, column, Press Value, and Release Value.

commands.name: Set Rapid Trigger Continuous State
commands.payloadDescription: The Command Payload selects the Rapid Trigger Continuous feature state; 0x00 disables it and 0x01 enables it.
commands.ackDescription: The acknowledgement returns only a status code indicating whether the Rapid Trigger Continuous state was set successfully.

commands.name: Get Rapid Trigger Continuous State
commands.payloadDescription: No Command Payload is required; send an empty payload to read the Rapid Trigger Continuous state.
commands.ackDescription: The acknowledgement returns a status code and the Rapid Trigger Continuous on/off state.

commands.name: Save Rapid Trigger Settings
commands.payloadDescription: No Command Payload is required; send an empty payload to save Rapid Trigger settings.
commands.ackDescription: The acknowledgement returns only a status code indicating whether the Rapid Trigger settings were saved successfully.

commands.name: Set Gamepad Curve
commands.payloadDescription: The Command Payload specifies the four input/output control point pairs for the Gamepad curve.
commands.ackDescription: The acknowledgement returns only a status code indicating whether the Gamepad curve was set successfully.

commands.name: Get Gamepad Curve
commands.payloadDescription: No Command Payload is required; send an empty payload to read the Gamepad curve control points.
commands.ackDescription: The acknowledgement returns a status code and the four input/output control point pairs for the Gamepad curve.

commands.name: Set Gamepad Mode
commands.payloadDescription: The Command Payload selects the Gamepad Mode state; 0x00 disables it and 0x01 enables it.
commands.ackDescription: The acknowledgement returns only a status code indicating whether Gamepad Mode was set successfully.

commands.name: Get Gamepad Mode
commands.payloadDescription: The Command Payload carries the Gamepad Mode state field used to read or synchronize the current mode.
commands.ackDescription: The acknowledgement returns a status code and the Gamepad Mode on/off state.

commands.name: Set Gamepad Override
commands.payloadDescription: The Command Payload selects whether Gamepad Override is enabled to control keyboard override or passthrough behavior.
commands.ackDescription: The acknowledgement returns only a status code indicating whether Gamepad Override was set successfully.

commands.name: Get Gamepad Override
commands.payloadDescription: No Command Payload is required; send an empty payload to read the Gamepad Override state.
commands.ackDescription: The acknowledgement returns a status code and the Gamepad Override enabled state.

commands.name: Get Macro Info
commands.payloadDescription: The Command Payload specifies the Macro Index whose summary information should be read.
commands.ackDescription: The acknowledgement returns a status code, Macro Index, and Total Step Count.

commands.name: Read Macro Chunk
commands.payloadDescription: The Command Payload specifies the Macro Index, start step, and requested step count used to read a macro chunk.
commands.ackDescription: The acknowledgement returns a status code, Macro Index, start step, actual received step count, and step data.

ack.comment: 6 bytes per step: [DelayType(0=Fixed,1=Random), DelayMS_L, DelayMS_H, Action(0=None,1=Press,2=Release), KC_L, KC_H]

commands.name: Delete Macro
commands.payloadDescription: The Command Payload specifies the Macro Index to delete.
commands.ackDescription: The acknowledgement returns only a status code indicating whether the macro was deleted successfully.

commands.name: Write Macro Field
commands.payloadDescription: The Command Payload specifies the Macro Index, Step Index, Field ID, and value bytes used to update one macro field.
commands.ackDescription: The acknowledgement returns a status code and Macro Index indicating whether the field write succeeded.

commands.name: Write Macro Bulk
commands.payloadDescription: The Command Payload specifies the Macro Index, start step, and up to four step records used for bulk macro writing.
commands.ackDescription: The acknowledgement returns a status code and Macro Index indicating whether the bulk write succeeded.

payload.comment:
0x01: count= 1 step
0x02: count= 2 step
0x03: count= 3 step
0x04: count= 4 step

0x00: Delay Type = Fixed
0x01: Delay Type = Random
DelayMS  byte (LE uint16, 0.65535 ms, after action)

0x00: Action = None
0x01: Action = Press
0x02:  Action = Release
Repeated offsets 2-8 are valid when count > 1

commands.name: Set SOCD (Depth-Based) Binding
commands.payloadDescription: The Command Payload defines a depth-based SOCD binding with primary/secondary key locations, Rapid Trigger state, press/release values, and actuation point.
commands.ackDescription: The acknowledgement returns only a status code indicating whether the depth-based SOCD binding was set successfully.

commands.name: Get SOCD (Depth-Based) Binding
commands.payloadDescription: No Command Payload is required; send an empty payload to read depth-based SOCD bindings sequentially.
commands.ackDescription: The acknowledgement uses the status code to report success, sending, or failure, and returns each depth-based SOCD binding with index, primary/secondary key locations, Rapid Trigger state, press/release values, and actuation point.

commands.name: Delete Binding
commands.payloadDescription: The Command Payload specifies the layer, row, and column of the binding to delete.
commands.ackDescription: The acknowledgement returns only a status code indicating whether the binding was deleted successfully.

commands.name: Set Test Mode
commands.payloadDescription: The Command Payload selects whether to enter or exit Test Mode.
commands.ackDescription: The acknowledgement returns a status code indicating whether the Test Mode transition succeeded; this command documents 0x01 as the success code.

commands.name: Set RF Test Mode Enable
commands.payloadDescription: No Command Payload is required; send an empty payload to enable RF Test Mode.
commands.ackDescription: The acknowledgement returns only a status code indicating whether RF Test Mode Enable succeeded.

commands.name: BLE Reboot
commands.payloadDescription: No Command Payload is required; send an empty payload to reboot the BLE module.
commands.ackDescription: The acknowledgement returns only a status code indicating whether the BLE Reboot command was accepted.

commands.name: Set RF Test XTAL Calibration
commands.payloadDescription: No Command Payload is required; send an empty payload to run RF Test XTAL Calibration.
commands.ackDescription: The acknowledgement returns only a status code indicating whether XTAL Calibration succeeded.

commands.name: Set RF Test Power
commands.payloadDescription: The Command Payload specifies the RF Test power level.
commands.ackDescription: The acknowledgement returns only a status code indicating whether RF Test Power was set successfully.

commands.name: Set RF Test Single Carrier Low CH
commands.payloadDescription: No Command Payload is required; send an empty payload to start the low-channel Single Carrier RF test.
commands.ackDescription: The acknowledgement returns only a status code indicating whether the low-channel Single Carrier test started successfully.

commands.name: Set RF Test Single Carrier Mid CH
commands.payloadDescription: No Command Payload is required; send an empty payload to start the mid-channel Single Carrier RF test.
commands.ackDescription: The acknowledgement returns only a status code indicating whether the mid-channel Single Carrier test started successfully.

commands.name: Set RF Test Single Carrier High CH
commands.payloadDescription: No Command Payload is required; send an empty payload to start the high-channel Single Carrier RF test.
commands.ackDescription: The acknowledgement returns only a status code indicating whether the high-channel Single Carrier test started successfully.

commands.name: Set RF Test Modulation Low CH
commands.payloadDescription: No Command Payload is required; send an empty payload to start the low-channel Modulation RF test.
commands.ackDescription: The acknowledgement returns only a status code indicating whether the low-channel Modulation test started successfully.

commands.name: Set RF Test Modulation Mid CH
commands.payloadDescription: No Command Payload is required; send an empty payload to start the mid-channel Modulation RF test.
commands.ackDescription: The acknowledgement returns only a status code indicating whether the mid-channel Modulation test started successfully.

commands.name: Set RF Test Modulation High CH
commands.payloadDescription: No Command Payload is required; send an empty payload to start the high-channel Modulation RF test.
commands.ackDescription: The acknowledgement returns only a status code indicating whether the high-channel Modulation test started successfully.

commands.name: Set RF Test Single Carrier Set
commands.payloadDescription: The Command Payload specifies the channel and power level for the RF Single Carrier test.
commands.ackDescription: The acknowledgement returns only a status code indicating whether the Single Carrier test was configured successfully for the selected channel.

commands.name: Set RF Test Modulation Set
commands.payloadDescription: The Command Payload specifies the channel, power level, and PHY speed for the RF Modulation test.
commands.ackDescription: The acknowledgement returns only a status code indicating whether the Modulation test was configured successfully for the selected channel.

commands.name: Set RF Test RX Sensitivity
commands.payloadDescription: The Command Payload specifies the channel and PHY speed for the RF RX Sensitivity test.
commands.ackDescription: The acknowledgement returns only a status code indicating whether the RX Sensitivity test was configured successfully.

commands.name: Set RF DTM Mode Enable
commands.payloadDescription: No Command Payload is required; send an empty payload to enable RF DTM Mode.
commands.ackDescription: The acknowledgement returns only a status code indicating whether RF DTM Mode Enable succeeded.

commands.name: Set Bt Protocol Send RF Test Continuous TX Test
commands.payloadDescription: The Command Payload specifies the RF channel used for the Continuous TX Test.
commands.ackDescription: The acknowledgement returns only a status code indicating whether the Continuous TX Test started successfully.

commands.name: Set Bt Protocol Send RF Test Continuous RX Test
commands.payloadDescription: The Command Payload specifies the RF channel used for the Continuous RX Test.
commands.ackDescription: The acknowledgement returns only a status code indicating whether the Continuous RX Test started successfully.

commands.name: Set Test Indicator LED State
commands.payloadDescription: The Command Payload uses a bit mask to control test indicator LEDs, including Num, Caps, Scroll, Win, and Fn.
commands.ackDescription: The acknowledgement returns a status code indicating whether the Test Indicator LED State was set successfully.

payload.comment:
Indicator LED bit mask:
bit0 Num
bit1 Caps
bit2 Scroll
bit3 Win
bit4 Fn
0=Off, 1=On

commands.name: Set Pairing Mode
commands.payloadDescription: The Command Payload selects the pairing target, such as Bluetooth 1-4 or Dongle Pairing.
commands.ackDescription: The acknowledgement returns a status code indicating whether Pairing Mode was set successfully.

commands.name: Get Test Connection Switch State
commands.payloadDescription: No Command Payload is required; send an empty payload to read the test connection switch state.
commands.ackDescription: The acknowledgement returns a status code and the current connection interface, such as USB, Bluetooth, or 2.4G.
